title: ForensicService
description: A forensic discipline or service line offered by OCME — Forensic Pathology, the Laboratories (Forensic Biology/DNA, Forensic Toxicology), Forensic Anthropology, Identification / Missing Persons, and Emergency Management. Reconstructed from the OCME services pages (nyc.gov/site/ocme/services); a service catalog, not casework. NO Open Data twin.

publicFacing.description: Whether the public / families interact with this service directly.
